types.label: Default
types.description: General-purpose structure for topics that don't fit a specific format. Independent, self-contained sections.

types.label: Listicle (5 items)
types.description: A countable set of things. One item per segment, each a character with a secret. Best for "5 ancient gardening secrets"-style videos.

types.label: Deep Dive (one topic)
types.description: One subject explored in depth. Sequential sections that withhold the how-to until the back half.

types.label: Story / Mystery
types.description: A narrative arc — the technique nobody could explain, a historical discovery. Each act ends on an unresolved question.

types.label: Myth-Bust
types.description: Corrects what the viewer believes. One myth per segment; conventional wisdom is the antagonist.
